mnemonics: ETL: Extract, Transform, Load - Remember the order as 'Eat Tasty Loads' to recall the three main stages of data transformation before loading into the warehouse.
keyPoints: Data transformation involves converting data from its original format into a format suitable for analysis and storage in the data warehouse.
Common transformation tasks include cleaning (removing errors), standardizing (consistent formats), aggregating (summarizing data), and enriching (adding new derived data).
The transformation process ensures data quality, consistency, and usability for business intelligence and reporting.
commonMistakes: Not properly validating or cleansing data during transformation, leading to 'garbage in, garbage out' (GIGO) in the warehouse.
Performing overly complex transformations that make it difficult to trace data back to its original source for auditing.
